brand_voice.summary: The brand communicates in a casual and informative tone, appealing to a broad audience interested in health and wellness. Their messaging is straightforward, focusing on delivering valuable insights without complex jargon.

strategic_gaps: Increase human presence in visuals to enhance relatability.
Incorporate text overlays to improve engagement and information delivery.
ogz_recommendation: To enhance brand engagement, OGZ would recommend increasing the use of videos, as they are the best performing format. Additionally, introducing more human elements in visuals could foster a stronger connection with the audience.
